name: Platform-Neutral Authentication Standards Adoption
consequences: Immediate: Formal engagement with eIDAS2 and NSIS frameworks to redefine authentication requirements → Systemic: 20% reduction in platform-specific trust signals by 2028, per regulatory impact assessments → Strategic: Forces public-sector procurement to prioritize interoperability, reducing reliance on Apple/Google integrity APIs. Controls vendor lock-in vs. technical complexity. Weakness: The options fail to consider resistance from legacy system integrators dependent on existing platform tools.

Propose national standards for FIDO2/WebAuthn-based identity verification
Integrate blockchain-based identity attestation as a radical alternative to platform-centric models
review: Controls vendor lock-in vs. technical complexity. Weakness: The options fail to consider resistance from legacy system integrators dependent on existing platform tools.
